logics.name: Vault
logics.code: logic Vault { state { skills: list<string>; certificates: list<string>; permissions: map<string, list<string>>; } function init() { self.skills = []; self.certificates = []; self.permissions = {}; } function addSkill(skill: string) { self.skills.push(skill); } function addCertificate(cert: string) { self.certificates.push(cert); } function grantAccess(user: string, fields: list<string>) { self.permissions[user] = fields; } }
